title: Blysmocarex macrantha
taxonomy: Blysmocarex macrantha is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a genus within the Cyperaceae family, and its classification is as follows: kingdom: Plantae, division: Liliopsida, class: Liliopsida, order: Poales, family: Cyperaceae, genus: Blysmocarex, species: B. macrantha. Blysmocarex macrantha is a species of sedge that is native to Asia. The classification of Blysmocarex macrantha is a way to understand its evolutionary relationships with other plants. Blysmocarex macrantha's classification can also provide valuable information about its habitat and growth requirements.
